Hero.text: In the gilded halls of the Vespanolan Empire, where the clangor of steel and the resonance of noble ideals intertwine, Artorius Vespanola, a second in line to the throne emerges as a formidable figure, draped in the regal mantle of leadership that befits the crown of the empire and leadership of the illustrious Vespan Knights. His presence commands attention, a striking embodiment of both martial prowess and unwavering virtue.
